subcodes.first_line: The substance [jawhar] is a single word which hath shone forth from the mouth of the Will, and by it the heat appeared which God made to be the cause of motion in the universe
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان الجوهر هی کلمة واحدة انها اشرقت من فم المشیة و بها ظهرت الحرارة التی قد جعلها الله علة الحرکة فی الآفاق
subcodes.subjects: @heat and motion, @praise and encouragement, @Word of God the cause of creation, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
